title: L&D Training Effectiveness Report - AI Agent & LLM Application Development
executiveSummary: The selected scope contains 1 course(s), 1 completed course(s), and 13 trainee-course records. Overall attendance is 90.4%, completion is 100%, pass rate is 92.3%, and average score is 7.88/10. Total training hours are 188 and scaled cost is 9.6. Overall effectiveness classification is Risk. Management interpretation: The training course 'AI Agent & LLM Application Development' has achieved a completion rate of 100% with an overall attendance rate of 90.4%. The pass rate stands at 92.3%, and the average score is 7.88 out of 10. Despite these positive metrics, the overall effectiveness classification is marked as Risk, indicating potential areas for improvement.
insights: AI Agent & LLM Application Development has an effectiveness score of 89.47 in the selected scope.
2 outstanding trainees met the star learner rule: score >= 9.0 and full attendance.
1 high-priority L&D NORM flag was triggered.
The course successfully engaged 13 trainees, resulting in a high completion rate and a commendable average score.

However, the effectiveness score of 89.47 suggests that while the course met basic training objectives, there are underlying issues that need to be addressed, particularly as indicated by the classification of Risk.
Additionally, feedback ratings average 4.73 out of 5, reflecting generally positive trainee experiences but also highlighting the need for targeted support for at-risk individuals.
recommendations: Assign a coaching owner, buddy support, and targeted practice resources for the flagged learner.
Furthermore, a review of course content and delivery methods should be conducted to enhance overall effectiveness and address the Risk classification.
Continuous monitoring of trainee performance and feedback will be essential to ensure sustained improvement.

checklist.detail: Required sheets and columns were mapped from Teams, OneDrive, Forms, KPI, Rules and Template sources.
Expected attendance rows are trainee count x total sessions. Late is retained for metrics as partial attendance.
Completed courses require one valid assessment and pass-status row per trainee.
NORM-14 requires at least 60% feedback response rate for valid analysis.
Duplicate rows and numeric ranges were checked before metric generation.

checklist.check: Consistency: course ID and pass-status logic
checklist.detail: Cross-source course IDs and pass-status logic were checked against the selected course catalog.

normFlags.action: Flag for coaching; assign buddy or practice resources

supportNeededTrainees.reason: Below pass threshold or attendance below 70%

supportNeededGroups.reason: At least one learner is below pass threshold or attendance policy.
